title: Converter OFX, TSV to CSV
description: Python scripts to convert bank export files from the OFX & TSV formats to the CSV format. In development : Browser window with drop file function.

title: Approval request App
description: A Microsoft Power Apps for internal approval request processes. Features : multi-language option, mandatory fields, auto-complete option, ... HTTP request, JSON parsing, power flow, up to the rejection or the approval.

title: Website portfolio
description: This portfolio site. React + Vite + TypeScript, data-driven project/skills/hackathon content, deployed via GitHub Actions to GitHub Pages.

title: CREA
description: Full-stack accountability platform for small creator groups. React + Vite frontend, Node + Express backend, PostgreSQL, JWT auth, Docker + GitHub Actions CI/CD. Not live yet.

title: UniFin
description: Bank tracker — evolution of the OFX/TSV converter into a unified tool for parsing and analyzing bank exports across multiple banks. In development.

title: Vending Machine
description: A vending machine simulation in C++, modelling stock, payment, and dispensing logic with classes.

title: Board Game
description: A board game built in C++, using classes to model the board, players, and turn-based gameplay.
